overall.description: A third-person horror game sequence following a schoolgirl in a sailor uniform ascending through a foggy, overgrown forest via stone stairs, approaching a traditional Japanese building, and entering a dark wooden hallway. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with dense fog and low lighting throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the weathered stone stairs through the dense foggy forest

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending through the forest
thick trees and undergrowth lining the left side of the path
thick trees and undergrowth lining the right side of the path
low stone wall partially covered in moss

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone stairway through a densely vegetated forest shrouded in thick fog. The environment is dark and atmospheric with low visibility, surrounded by trees and stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to abandoned building with secondary stairs

events.description: reaches top of initial stairs and turns toward the abandoned building visible through the fog
turns right to ascend the second set of stone stairs leading upward

agents.ego_description: approaching the abandoned building, turning left then right to continue up the secondary stairway

entered.detail: large traditional wooden building looming in the fog
traditional wooden gate structure at the building entrance
second set of stone stairs leading up to the building level

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest stairs and turns toward an abandoned traditional building visible through the fog. After passing a wooden gate, the character turns right to ascend a second set of stone stairs, with the building now visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with wooden railing approaching building entrance

events.description: reaches top of secondary stairs and enters elevated walkway with wooden railing
approaching the building entrance, about to transition indoors

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated dirt path with wooden railing toward the building entrance

entered.detail: weathered wooden safety railing along the elevated path
tall wooden utility pole with wires
dark doorway entrance to the wooden building

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated dirt path with a wooden railing on the right, the character approaches the entrance to the abandoned building. The path is flanked by trees on the left and the building structure on the right, with the entrance becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark traditional Japanese school hallway with shoji windows

events.description: enters the building from the outdoor fog into the dimly lit interior hallway
moving deeper into the hallway where lighting becomes darker and more shadowed

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through the dimly lit wooden hallway, passing by shoji windows and student lockers

entered.detail: long corridor with dark wooden floors and walls
traditional paper-paneled windows allowing dim light
wooden student shoe lockers lining the right wall
dim overhead lights illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark traditional Japanese school hallway with wooden floors and shoji windows. The interior is dimly lit with overhead lights, featuring student lockers on the right and classroom doors. The atmosphere shifts from outdoor fog to enclosed wooden interior as the character explores deeper into the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense, fog-shrouded forest ascending toward the oppressive interior of an abandoned traditional building. It begins with the character climbing a stone stairway through thick vegetation and low visibility, where the dark atmosphere is enclosed by towering trees and stone walls. As the character emerges from the woods, the camera turns toward a distant structure visible through the mist, passing through a wooden gate and ascending a second set of stairs. The scene then shifts to an elevated dirt path flanked by a wooden railing and trees, leading directly toward the building's entrance. Finally, the environment transforms from the outdoor fog into a dimly lit wooden hallway, moving past student lockers and shoji windows as the character ventures deeper into the enclosed school.
